meta.title: Dale Peterson's S4x20 Mini-Keynote
meta.description: Dale kicks off S4x20 with 15-minutes discussing ICS security community growth, failure to stop predicted incidents, and the focus on executive communication and risk management. He closes with a recommendation and plea that ICS security professionals use this fantastic demand for their talent to find something they believe, enroll in it, and help create the future of OT / ICS security.
